name: aptlyable
description: AptlyAble — bulk MP3/MP4 transcription (Next.js + AWS) with multi-provider transcription.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace services/api run typecheck && npm --workspace services/worker run typecheck && npm --workspace infrastructure run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace services/api run test && npm --workspace services/worker run test
